chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.100 of 2023 Subhanuddin Versus Muhammad Rashid Date Order with signature of Judge For order as to non-prosecution of appeal As office objection not complied with. Dated: 23.02.2024 None present. -.-.- This appeal is coming up for non-prosecution/office objections since two dates. On the last date counsel was called absent and a week’s time was granted for compliance and today position is same. There is no intimation either. Instant appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge
